name: Withings
description: Withings provides health and wellness data from connected devices like smart scales, blood pressure monitors, sleep trackers, and activity watches. The API gives access to body measurements, sleep analysis, heart rate data, and daily activity metrics collected by Withings hardware.

capabilities.name: get_body_measurements
capabilities.description: Retrieve body measurements such as weight, fat mass, muscle mass, BMI, and body water percentage recorded by Withings scales.

capabilities.name: get_heart_data
capabilities.description: Retrieve heart rate readings including resting heart rate, blood pressure measurements, and ECG recordings from Withings devices.

capabilities.name: get_sleep_data
capabilities.description: Retrieve sleep tracking data including duration, sleep stages (deep, light, REM, awake), and sleep quality scores.

capabilities.name: get_activity_data
capabilities.description: Retrieve daily activity metrics such as steps, distance, calories burned, elevation, and active minutes.

capabilities.name: get_intraday_activity
capabilities.description: Retrieve high-resolution intraday activity data with heart rate, steps, and calories at minute-level granularity.

capabilities.name: list_devices
capabilities.description: List all Withings devices associated with the user account, including device type, model, battery level, and last sync time.
